coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 2-group, 24-node closure.
validation: The authored fixed five-way pipe icon has exact topology and bit-for-bit matching local bounds. Blender reports all source faces smooth, no sharp edges, and one corner-normal value per point, which the GN-VM point normals preserve. Cylinder.006 was audited alongside it and intentionally evaluates to empty geometry in both Blender and GN-VM; it is an attribute/material helper rather than a gallery generator.
